title: Feedback
description: Structured feedback from task execution, used to drive skill evolution.

status.description: Whether the execution outcome was successful or not.

lesson.description: A reusable insight extracted from this execution. Must be specific enough to guide future behavior.

source.description: How the feedback was obtained: explicit user statement, inferred from user input, inferred from execution result, or default.

confidence.description: Confidence in the lesson's validity. Below min_feedback_confidence (default 0.35), the skill bank is NOT mutated.

reasoning.description: Optional detailed reasoning behind the lesson extraction.
